'''Worra''' was a [[Womp rat/Legends|womp rat]] who lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] between the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Boelo]], a henchman of<ref name="CCG" /> the [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]]<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|130|Jabba the Hutt (Jabba Desilijic Tiure)}}</ref> [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]], owned Worra as a pet.<ref name="CCG" />

==Behind the scenes==
Worra was first mentioned in the lore for the Boelo character's card in the [[1998]] ''[[Special Edition Limited]]'' expansion set of [[Decipher]]'s [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]].<ref name="CCG" />
